from __future__ import annotations

import unittest


class BaseTestCase(unittest.TestCase):
    def setUp(self) -> None:
        self.base_url = "https://service.local"


class TestUsers(BaseTestCase):
    pass


class TestOrders(BaseTestCase):
    pass


def unittest_test_class_duplicates_setup_without_base_class_negative() -> int:
    return len(TestUsers.__mro__) + len(TestOrders.__mro__)
